title: Curse Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:CruciatusCurseSpider.gif|thumb|400px|Alastor Moody using the Cruciatus Curse to inflict unspeakable pain on a spider as part of a demonstration]]

==Summary==
'''Curse Manipulation''' is the ability to inflict curses and/or control the nature of curses, fantastical abilities that are explicitly intended to cause harm and misfortune against the target. Curses are primarily depicted as [[Magic|magical]] in nature and generally fall under the classification of Dark Arts, but they sometimes fall under an entirely different designation.

==Possible Uses==
*'''[[Death Manipulation]]:''' Some curses are known to inflict instantaneous death to swiftly murder their targets.
*'''[[Mind Manipulation]]:''' Some curses were created for the purpose of controlling a target, allowing the user to manipulate the target from a distance without actively concentrating on them with a successful applications.
*'''[[Pain Manipulation]]:''' Many curses were created with the intention of torturing the target, allowing them to induce the sensation of agony in a target at will.

==Users==

*[[Voldemort|Dark]] [[Bellatrix Lestrange|Wizards]] ([[Wizarding World]])
*The [[Maleficent|many]] [[Maleficent (Movie)|versions]] [[Maleficent (Kingdom Hearts)|of]] [[Maleficent (OUAT)|Maleficent]] ([[Disney]], [[Kingdom Hearts]], and [[Once Upon a Time (OUAT)|OUAT]])
